steps.prompt: Step 1 of 10: Add dependency-free client-side feature search to the existing Memory product site. Preserve the current design and content. Add the exact marker FUNC-01-SEARCH in index.html and scripts/app.js. Create scripts/app.js if it does not exist, wire it from index.html with a local script tag, add an accessible search input, and filter visible feature/content cards as the user types.
memory_questions: What should Memory's feature search emphasize on the product site?
score_commands: sh scripts/check.sh && node --check scripts/app.js && grep -q 'scripts/app.js' index.html && grep -q 'FUNC-01-SEARCH' scripts/app.js && ! grep -E 'https?://|unpkg|jsdelivr|cdn' index.html scripts/app.js

steps.prompt: Step 2 of 10: Add section/category filter controls for product topics such as retrieval, graph, agents, evaluation, activity, and privacy. Preserve the search from step 1. Add exact marker FUNC-02-FILTERS in index.html and scripts/app.js. The controls must be keyboard-accessible buttons and update the displayed sections without reloading.
memory_questions: Which Memory product topics should filters expose for users?
score_commands: sh scripts/check.sh && node --check scripts/app.js && grep -q 'FUNC-02-FILTERS' index.html && grep -q 'FUNC-02-FILTERS' scripts/app.js && grep -qi 'aria-pressed' index.html

steps.prompt: Step 3 of 10: Add an interactive token-cost estimator panel. Preserve earlier functionality. Add exact marker FUNC-03-TOKEN-ESTIMATOR in index.html and scripts/app.js. Users should be able to enter baseline and Memory token counts and see a calculated delta with clear labels.
memory_questions: How should Memory evaluation reports describe token usage and cost tradeoffs?
score_commands: sh scripts/check.sh && node --check scripts/app.js && grep -q 'FUNC-03-TOKEN-ESTIMATOR' index.html && grep -q 'FUNC-03-TOKEN-ESTIMATOR' scripts/app.js && grep -qi 'token' index.html

steps.prompt: Step 4 of 10: Add an evaluation comparison toggle that switches between no-memory and full-memory explanations. Preserve earlier functionality. Add exact marker FUNC-04-EVAL-TOGGLE in index.html and scripts/app.js. The visible copy should explain score, Memory evidence, token usage, and latency for the selected condition.
memory_questions: How do paired no-memory versus full-memory evaluation comparisons work in Memory?
score_commands: sh scripts/check.sh && node --check scripts/app.js && grep -q 'FUNC-04-EVAL-TOGGLE' index.html && grep -q 'FUNC-04-EVAL-TOGGLE' scripts/app.js && grep -qi 'full-memory' index.html

steps.prompt: Step 5 of 10: Add a memory-type explorer with tabs for plan, implementation, debugging, reference, and project memories. Preserve earlier functionality. Add exact marker FUNC-05-MEMORY-TABS in index.html and scripts/app.js. Tabs must update the visible explanation and use accessible tab roles or equivalent ARIA labels.
memory_questions: What are the different Memory memory types used for?
score_commands: sh scripts/check.sh && node --check scripts/app.js && grep -q 'FUNC-05-MEMORY-TABS' index.html && grep -q 'FUNC-05-MEMORY-TABS' scripts/app.js && grep -qi 'role="tab"' index.html

steps.prompt: Step 6 of 10: Add a graph relationship inspector that lets users select a node and see related memories, files, or concepts. Preserve earlier functionality. Add exact marker FUNC-06-GRAPH-INSPECTOR in index.html and scripts/app.js. Keep it static and dependency-free with preloaded data in JavaScript.
memory_questions: How does graph context help Memory query answers?
score_commands: sh scripts/check.sh && node --check scripts/app.js && grep -q 'FUNC-06-GRAPH-INSPECTOR' index.html && grep -q 'FUNC-06-GRAPH-INSPECTOR' scripts/app.js && grep -qi 'graph' index.html

steps.prompt: Step 7 of 10: Add a get-up-to-speed checklist for new agents. Preserve earlier functionality. Add exact marker FUNC-07-CHECKLIST in index.html and scripts/app.js. Checklist state should persist in localStorage, include a reset control, and summarize progress.
memory_questions: How should a new agent get up to speed in this project?
score_commands: sh scripts/check.sh && node --check scripts/app.js && grep -q 'FUNC-07-CHECKLIST' index.html && grep -q 'FUNC-07-CHECKLIST' scripts/app.js && grep -q 'localStorage' scripts/app.js

steps.prompt: Step 8 of 10: Add a copy/export summary feature. Preserve earlier functionality. Add exact marker FUNC-08-EXPORT in index.html and scripts/app.js. Users should be able to copy a generated Memory adoption/evaluation summary, with graceful fallback text when clipboard access is unavailable.
memory_questions: What should a concise Memory evaluation summary include?
score_commands: sh scripts/check.sh && node --check scripts/app.js && grep -q 'FUNC-08-EXPORT' index.html && grep -q 'FUNC-08-EXPORT' scripts/app.js && grep -qi 'clipboard' scripts/app.js

steps.prompt: Step 9 of 10: Add a keyboard-accessible command palette for jumping to key sections and actions. Preserve earlier functionality. Add exact marker FUNC-09-COMMAND-PALETTE in index.html and scripts/app.js. It should open with a documented keyboard shortcut, trap obvious focus targets reasonably, and close with Escape.
memory_questions: How do the Memory CLI and TUI help users inspect memory?
score_commands: sh scripts/check.sh && node --check scripts/app.js && grep -q 'FUNC-09-COMMAND-PALETTE' index.html && grep -q 'FUNC-09-COMMAND-PALETTE' scripts/app.js && grep -qi 'Escape' index.html scripts/app.js

steps.prompt: Step 10 of 10: Polish all interactive functionality for accessibility, responsive layout, and progressive enhancement. Preserve all previous markers and functionality. Add exact marker FUNC-10-FINAL-POLISH in index.html, styles.css, and scripts/app.js. Ensure the page remains dependency-free and still explains Memory clearly.
memory_questions: What should a polished Memory front page emphasize before release?
score_commands: sh scripts/check.sh && node --check scripts/app.js && grep -q 'FUNC-10-FINAL-POLISH' index.html && grep -q 'FUNC-10-FINAL-POLISH' styles.css && grep -q 'FUNC-10-FINAL-POLISH' scripts/app.js && ! grep -E 'https?://|unpkg|jsdelivr|cdn' index.html scripts/app.js
